content.en:
"How could there be such a terrifying half-step true spirit? even in the chaos, there is almost no such a half-step true spirit that defies the sky!"

Baili Zhenjun was both shocked and extremely frightened.

He has also seen a lot in the chaos, and even heard many legends, but he has never heard of a genius who is as against the sky as Ye Tian, which simply breaks the boundary.

"If this continues, the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi is not dead, and the Demon Sound Sect is dead!"

Baili Zhenjun thought to himself.

But now it's not like he can end it if he wants to, they don't want to fight, but Wanfa Daozi Ye Tian won't let them go.

Rumble!

Another true monarch was killed by Ye Tian, and his body was incinerated into ashes by the eternal fire.

Even Baili Zhenjun was not lightly injured, and he didn't dare to get close to Ye Tian at all.

With the passage of time, almost all the disciples below the Heavenly Monarch of the Demon Sound Sect fell and died, their strength was too weak, and even the aftermath was difficult to resist, and a single spatial shock was enough to kill a large number of disciples.

Before, there were Heavenly Monarchs or half-step True Spirits to help protect these disciples, but as more and more Heavenly Monarchs died, they couldn't even take care of themselves, so naturally they couldn't protect these weak disciples.

Gradually, even the Heavenly Monarch died nearly seventy percent or more, there were only more than twenty half-step True Spirits left, and only sixteen or seventeen True Monarchs left, of which ten True Monarchs were still unable to act.

Moreover, all of them were not lightly injured.

Maybe in a little while, the Demon Sound Sect of the Great Universe will be completely destroyed!

......

"Baili, what should I do now?"

The Demon Sound Sect's Ao Xuan True Monarch said.

"There's no way, I've already informed the True Ancestors of the Demon Sound Sect in Chaos, as for whether the True Ancestors have a way to save us, it's not very clear!"

Baili Zhenjun said helplessly.

Although these people have great potential, the True Ancestors are in chaos, and they can't enter the Great Universe at all, how can they be saved.

Of course.

If the True Ancestors were willing to pay a huge price to be able to temporarily descend into an incarnation into the Great Universe, but in that case, the price paid would be too great, even enough to put a True Ancestor to sleep hard.

Would the True Ancestors pay such a price for them?

"It shouldn't be possible!"

Baili Zhenjun thought desperately.

After a few more seconds, several more True Monarchs fell, and even the ten True Monarchs who maintained the Void Forbidden Secret Technique also joined the battle group at this moment, no longer restricting Ye Tian's departure at all.

But Ye Tian didn't need to leave at all, he alone was enough to destroy the Demon Sound Sect.

"Die!"

Ye Tian condensed eternity without extinguishing the fire, turned into a sword, and then blessed the Extreme Sword Divine Power, and instantly hit Baili Zhenjun.

This moment.

Baili Zhenjun's whole person was like a sluggish, falling into despair, he couldn't avoid Ye Tian's attack, once he was pierced through his body, he would definitely die.

Looking at Baili Zhenjun, who was about to be killed, Ye Tian's slightly tired face also showed a smile.

"As soon as Baili Zhenjun died, the Demon Sound Sect was completely powerless to resist. If I delay any longer, my strength will be too much to consume, and I'm afraid I will have to leave!" Ye Tian said darkly.

His power is not endless, even if the universe in his body can store a large amount of energy, and he can also use various treasures to restore his strength, but the combat consumption is too great, and the recovery speed cannot match the consumption speed.

Therefore, Ye Tian couldn't fight for a long time.

If one can fight forever, it will be too rebellious.

Suddenly.

The void shook.

An ancient figure appeared in front of Baili Zhenjun, and Ye Tian's Eternal Immortal Flame was extinguished in an instant, and the Eternal Immortal Flame Extinguishing that was constantly burning on the bodies of the Demon Sound Sect was also extinguished one by one.

"I've seen Dao Ancestor!"

The Demon Sound Sect worships one Heavenly Monarch and the True Monarch.

"Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian's pupils shrank, extremely shocked.

He knew that Dao Ancestor was terrifying, even the Great Universe could not restrict Dao Ancestor, and Dao Ancestor even only needed to pay some price to send an incarnation containing power into the Great Universe.

For example, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor can do this, but it is not necessary.

After all, Dao Ancestor didn't want to pay those costs, it didn't do him any good, and some of the prices that Dao Ancestors paid were extremely terrifying prices for True Ancestors.

In the absence of certain benefits, the Dao Ancestors did not want their own strength to be damaged, in case an enemy happened to attack him, it would be a disaster.

But Ye Tian was afraid that a Dao Ancestor would rather pay some price and kill him!

The Dao Ancestor who appeared in front of him, Ye Tian knew the origin, it was a Dao Ancestor of the Demon Yin Sect - Nanyou Dao Ancestor, among the several Dao Ancestors of the Demon Yin Sect, he ranked second, and his strength was not much weaker than the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"I've seen Nanyou Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said politely.

"Ye Tian, a disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, you are very good, you dare to slaughter so many disciples of my Demon Yin Sect, and some of them are even expected to be promoted to True Ancestor, and even have a glimmer of hope to be promoted to Dao Ancestor!"

Nanyou Dao Ancestor said coldly.

A wisp of his murderous intent landed on Ye Tian's body, making Ye Tian tremble.

At this moment, another figure appeared beside Ye Tian.

"Master!"

Ye Tian said in surprise.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor glanced at Ye Tian, his eyes were full of satisfaction.

He stared at Nanyou Dao Ancestor and said, "Nan You, there has been an agreement between our Dao Ancestors that we must not interfere in the affairs of the Great Universe, do you want to break the agreement?"

"Xutian, it's not that I want to break the agreement, but your disciple has gone too far, and this is to destroy the foundation of our Demon Sound Sect in the Great Universe. Our Demon Sound Sect also paid a lot of price to send so many disciples into the Great Universe, and here are the elite elites of our Demon Sound Sect in this era, a group of True Ancestor Seeds have fallen, how can you let me calm down!"

Nanyou Dao Ancestor said angrily.

"Nanyou Dao Ancestor, I can make Ye Tian stop making a move against the Demon Sound Sect, but you need to pay some price!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestral Dao.

"What, you still want me to pay?" When Nanyou Daozu heard this, he immediately became angry.

"If you don't want to, then don't ask for the foundation of the Demon Sound Sect in the Great Universe!" said the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor with a smile.

"You ......"

Nanyou Dao Ancestor was extremely angry, but he didn't dare to really break with the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, otherwise the price paid would be too great.

The foundation of the Demon Sound Sect in the Great Universe must not be destroyed, otherwise, for a long time, the Demon Sound Sect will not be able to send people in, and even before the Great Universe transforms into a Dao Realm, the Demon Sound Sect has almost no chance with the Great Universe.

Once this is done, then no one in the Demon Sound Sect will be able to achieve Dao Ancestor here in the future.

If you want to achieve a Dao Ancestor, you need the quota of the Ancestral Monument, but how to get the quota has something to do with luck, and you must occupy a territory in the great universe, which is the minimum foundation.

If the foundation of the Great Universe of the Demon Sound Sect is destroyed, then the territory will be completely divided by other forces.

In the later stage, once the territory of the entire Great Universe and even the entire Dao Realm is divided, it will be very difficult for other forces to intervene.

One ancestral monument, nine places.

If it is according to normal competition, the Demon Sound Sect is very likely to get a place, which means that the Demon Sound Sect is expected to give birth to another Dao Ancestor.

The value of a Dao Ancestor is far from being comparable to other treasures, it is a true pillar that is enough to strengthen a party's power!

"Okay, I'm willing to pay some price so that your disciples don't deal with our Demon Yin Sect anymore!"

Nanyou Daozu compromised.
